notes: MLCommons AILuminate is a safety benchmark for evaluating LLM safety across hazard categories.

data.description: Safety benchmark for evaluating LLM safety across hazard categories, developed by the MLCommons AI Safety Working Group.
data.notes: AILuminate defines hazard categories for LLM safety evaluation. Hazard categories are identified by slug names. Published with an accompanying arXiv paper.

versions_available.note: First edition of AILuminate safety benchmark.

data.note: Conceptual taxonomy — hazard categories defined in the AILuminate benchmark. No per-item URLs.

examples.note: Hazard category for violent crime content
Hazard category for hate speech content
